steps.label: SKU typos — casing / O-vs-0 / l-vs-1
steps.resolution: Standardized to canonical SKU (uppercase; O→0, I/L→1). Rows retained.

steps.label: Duplicate shipment lines
steps.resolution: Dropped exact duplicate (shipment_id, SKU) lines; kept first occurrence.

steps.label: Phantom shipments — unknown store
steps.resolution: Dropped — store_id absent from the store master.

steps.label: Negative quantities
steps.resolution: Sign error corrected to absolute value. Rows retained.

steps.label: Missing received quantity
steps.resolution: Dropped — received quantity missing and cannot be honestly imputed.

steps.label: Incomplete loads — under-delivery
steps.resolution: Flagged is_incomplete=True for follow-up. Rows retained.

steps.label: Late deliveries
steps.resolution: Flagged is_late=True for follow-up. Rows retained.
